offline.title: You're offline.
offline.message: It looks like this device is not connected to the internet. Reconnect, then retry to continue.
offline.hint: Your current page is preserved while you reconnect.
offline.still_offline: No connection yet. Check your network and try again.

hero.summary: A multidisciplinary collection spanning product design, expressive interfaces, and dependable engineering — shaped from first idea to shipped product.

disciplines.title: Three disciplines. One product mindset.
disciplines.description: Design, front-end, and back-end — three connected parts of one product.

design.title: Product & UI/UX Design
design.description: Research, flows, wireframes, interfaces, and scalable visual systems that turn complexity into usable products.

frontend.title: Front-End Development
frontend.description: Responsive React interfaces with precise typography, meaningful motion, accessibility, and production-quality behavior.

backend.title: Back-End & APIs
backend.description: Services, data models, authentication, and integrations designed to keep digital products reliable beyond the interface.

contact.title: Let's build it.
contact.description: Available for thoughtful product, design, and full-stack collaborations.

portfolio_v2.note: Some portfolio work uses open-source technologies or adapted learning material. Original contribution, context, and attribution are identified within the relevant project whenever applicable.

cookie_consent.title: Your choices, your data
cookie_consent.description: Necessary storage keeps the site working. With your permission, I also use analytics to understand performance and marketing technologies to measure campaigns. You can accept, reject, or choose each category.
cookie_consent.manage_description: Necessary technologies are always active. Optional categories stay off unless you choose to enable them, and you can change your decision at any time.
cookie_consent.necessary_description: Security, language choice, consent preferences, and core site functions.
cookie_consent.analytics_description: Helps me understand visits and improve how the portfolio performs.
cookie_consent.marketing_description: Allows campaign measurement and advertising-related technologies.

hero.summary: Designer & full-stack developer building precise, memorable digital products.

work.title: Built with purpose
work.intro: A selection of disciplines I bring together to turn an idea into a polished, working product.

product.title: Product & Interface Design
product.description: Clear digital experiences shaped through research, systems thinking and precise visual craft.

frontend.title: Front-End Experiences
frontend.description: Responsive, accessible interfaces with purposeful motion and dependable performance.

backend.title: Back-End Systems
backend.description: APIs and services that keep products secure, maintainable and ready to grow.

about.lead: I'm Cristian — a software engineer who cares as much about how things <accent>feel</accent> as how they work. I design and build user-friendly, visually sharp products end to end, from the first pixel to the last deploy.
about.body: Proven my ability to deliver high-quality work, adapt to new technologies, collaborate with cross-functional teams, and stay currently with industry trends.
about.education:
BSc Software Engineering, UTM
Programming & Analysis, CEITI

product.title: Product Design
product.description: UX/UI, wireframes and design systems that turn ideas into clear, usable interfaces.

frontend.title: Front-End Dev
frontend.description: Fast, accessible, animated interfaces in React & TypeScript — pixel-precise and responsive.

backend.title: Back-End & APIs
backend.description: Node, Express and MongoDB services with auth, storage and everything the front-end needs.

brand.title: Brand & Identity
brand.description: Logos, visual systems and the small details that make a personal or product brand stick.

feedback.title: Feedback
feedback.description: Spotted something off, or have an idea? Tell me — it goes straight to my inbox.
feedback.subject: Website feedback

about_me.self_description: As a proficient Developer, I have a passion for visually appealing and user-friendly websites, applications and other types of projects. Proven my ability to deliver high-quality work, adapt to new technologies, collaborate with cross-functional teams, and stay currently with industry trends. I am a young software-engineer student, at the beginning of my career, having a ton of ambitious ideas and the motivation and discipline to realize them in management, design and development.
